title: roettlera urticifolia
intro: Roettlera urticifolia, also known as the stinging nettle tree, is a plant species belonging to the family Celastraceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant compounds. Its health benefits include alleviating symptoms of arthritis, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Roettlera urticifolia can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally or applied topically to the skin for its therapeutic effects.
